programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A mother in Philadelphia takes on a biker who shatters her window. In England, two drivers get into a street fight that appears to involve a rock. A school bus in South Carolina veers off-road and slams into a house.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A crossing guard in Pennsylvania fights an impatient motorist, while in Texas, a four-car pileup leads to a stabbing on the freeway; in Thailand, an exploding manhole cover propels a motorcyclist upward.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A man in San Diego strikes an SUV with a bat; a woman is sent flying by a garbage truck; a semi truck driver's life hangs in the balance when an erratic driver causes her rig to careen halfway off a bridge in Louisville.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A motorist brandishes a knife at a semi driver after they collide on an Albuquerque highway. Police in Ohio utilize multiple PIT maneuvers during a high-speed chase. An SUV driver attempts a multi-point turn while dangling off a steep drop in China. A man in Kentucky attempts to document an allegedly dangerous driver, who then pulls a firearm on him.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A motorist struggles to break up a fistfight between drivers in New Jersey. A cyclist turns traffic vigilante in England and clashes with commuters. A runaway circling car heads toward its ejected driver in Montana. A police chase in Texas turns dire when the suspect plows through a shopping mall.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In Apollo Beach, Fla., a woman brandishes a gun after an alleged altercation on the road; after a wild chase through downtown Los Angeles, a man attempts to flee from police on a skateboard.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In a Michigan parking lot, a truck driver repeatedly rams a car in a seemingly random attack; on a remote road in Oklahoma, motorcyclists get into an altercation with the driver of a pickup truck who calls in a sibling and a neighbor for backup.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: An entitled district attorney in New York gets contentious with police after a speeding infraction; a motorist blinded by the sun in California launches his SUV over a cliff; a dispute involving ex-girlfriends in Georgia.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: At a red light in Phoenix, a man gets out of his car to confront another motorist, who ends up driving directly into him; when a large truck slows traffic on a small road in New Jersey, an angry driver gets out of his car with a baseball bat.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A New York City driver gets into a brutal street fight with an electric unicycler after allegedly cutting him off; a motorcyclist risks his own life to help a driver with a stalled car get off the highway.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: Drivers in Harlem hurl insults during an intense standoff over a parking spot. In England, bystanders intervene when two boys appear to take a motorbike that doesn't belong to them. On a Minnesota highway, a wrong-way driver leaves a ten-mile path of destruction. Drivers in Thailand face the wrath of a road raging beast.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A driver in Los Angeles squares off with a group of cyclists in a battle over the right-of-way; a motorcyclist in Arkansas pursues a driver he believes left the scene of an accident; after a fender bender in China, a woman gets physical.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A sideswipe on a Texas freeway leads to a heated confrontation; a motorist rear-ends a biker in Australia, then snatches his bag; a pedestrian takes a swing at a trooper on a Florida highway; a right-of-way mix-up causes a collision in Texas; a California woman discovers a wild bear trapped inside her SUV; a driver in Turkey tries to chase down a tow truck that seized his car.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A traffic jam spat on a California freeway between a motorcyclist and driver turns destructive; in Minnesota, two bicyclists square off with a driver over a right-of-way dispute; a pickup towing a multi-ton drum in Alabama inadvertently releases its payload into oncoming traffic; wildfire fighters in California race to escape an inferno.

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: At a Texas superstore, a customer gets irate after an employee asks to check her receipt before she leaves. In Florida, a man allegedly attacks a couple in a restaurant... and a server who joins the brawl may know more than she admits. A simple trip to the store turns into a heated confrontation in a Michigan parking lot when one customer accuses another of illegally parking in a handicap space. I

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: On a flight in Florida, passengers turn on a woman who rushes to the front of the line waiting to deboard.
